'''Fegegrish Heavy Industrials''' was a corporation that developed and manufactured heavy-duty tools such as demolition devices such as the [[Squib battering ram]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', the company was spelled as '''Fegigrish Heavy Industrials'''.
